anyOf.description: A duplicate `messageId` arrives; the Idempotent Receiver must apply it once.
A poison message repeatedly fails handling; after bounded attempts it must land in the DLQ.
A crash mid-handle redelivers the message; it must apply exactly once.

description: The reliability scenario a `ReliabilityVector` exercises (doc 13 §2.d "idempotency / DLQ behavior vectors").
